task: Assemble backend and schema signoff bundle
acceptance_criteria: Schema, collector, analytics, and control-plane Oracle evidence are all covered by explicit commands
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/schema/test_schema_bootstrap.py tests/api/analytics tests/integration/metrics_pipeline tests/integration/analytics_queries tests/integration/control_plane
notes: Backend signoff suite passed and was supplemented with `pnpm test:control-plane:oracle` so Oracle live-gate evidence is current in the same control loop

validation_command: pnpm openapi:check && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm smoke
